'''Flying Cape''' is a dyable equipable accessory that makes your dog look like a superhero!{{Item
| image = Flying cape.png
| id = flying_cape_
| type = Customization
| Subtype = Dyeable
| stackable = 64
}}

== Obtaining ==
=== Crafting ===
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Ingredients
! Recipe
|-
| Wool <br>+ Phantom Membrane
| [[File:Flying_cape_crafting.png]]
|}
== Usage ==
{{Accessory_use}}

== Trivia ==
* It was introduced in DTN 1.17.2.
